title: Area Calculator
description: Define functions for area of rectangle, circle, and triangle. Call each with sample values and print the results.

title: Temperature Converter
description: Define celsius_to_fahrenheit(c) and fahrenheit_to_celsius(f) functions. Test both with sample values.
solution:
def c_to_f(c):
    return (c * 9/5) + 32

def f_to_c(f):
    return (f - 32) * 5/9

print(f"0C = {c_to_f(0)}F")
print(f"100C = {c_to_f(100)}F")
print(f"32F = {f_to_c(32)}C")
print(f"212F = {f_to_c(212)}C")
